insight1_lead: In the dataset, native planting and natural regeneration account for the largest restored area.
insight1_1: Natural regeneration and native planting show the largest area in monitored states.
insight1_2: Agroforestry systems contribute significantly in Rondônia.
insight2_lead: Amazonas and Pará stand out in carbon stock in the most recent years.
insight2_1: Amazonas: highest carbon rate per hectare in 2023 (42 tCO₂e).
insight2_2: Pará: largest area in 2020 (1,200 ha) with 35 tCO₂e.
insight2_3: Use the map and filters to explore by region.
insight3_lead: The 2020–2023 series shows growth in restored area and carbon sequestration.
insight3_1: Positive variation in area between first and last year in most regions.
insight3_2: Data Lab charts allow analysis of evolution by year and method.
error_backend_hint: Check that the backend is running at
